sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { X, Video, Link, FileVideo, Upload, Plus } from 'lucide-react'; const CourseUploadModal = ({ show, onClose, courseForm, setCourseForm, onSubmit, dragActive, thumbnailDragActive, handleDrag, handleThumbnailDrag, handleDrop, handleThumbnailDrop, handleVideoUpload, handleThumbnailUpload, removeVideo, addVideoUrl }) => { if (!show) return null; return (

Upload New Course

setCourseForm({...courseForm, title: e.target.value})} className="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500 transition-colors" placeholder="Enter course title" required />
setCourseForm({...courseForm, price: e.target.value})} className="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500 transition-colors" placeholder="99" min="1" required />
setCourseForm({...courseForm, time: e.target.value})} className="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500 transition-colors" placeholder="8h 30m" />
{/* Video Upload Section */}

{/* Show existing videos */} {courseForm.videos.length > 0 && (

Added Videos

{courseForm.videos.map((video, index) => (

Video {index + 1}

{video}

))}
)}

Add Video

{courseForm.videoType === 'link' ? (
setCourseForm({...courseForm, newVideoUrl: e.target.value})} className="flex-1 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500 transition-colors" placeholder="https://dropbox.com/s/xyz/video.mp4 or YouTube/Vimeo link" />
) : (
document.getElementById('videoUpload').click()} > e.target.files[0] && handleVideoUpload(e.target.files[0])} className="hidden" id="videoUpload" />

{dragActive ? 'Drop video here' : 'Click to upload or drag and drop'}

MP4, MOV, AVI up to 500MB

)}
{/* Fixed Thumbnail Upload */}
document.getElementById('thumbnailUpload').click()} > e.target.files[0] && handleThumbnailUpload(e.target.files[0])} className="hidden" id="thumbnailUpload" />

{thumbnailDragActive ? 'Drop image here' : 'Click to upload or drag and drop'}

PNG, JPG, GIF up to 10MB

{courseForm.img !== 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1516321318423-f06f85e504b3?w=400&h=200&fit=crop' && (

Thumbnail uploaded successfully!

)}
); }; export default CourseUploadModal;
